name: Teriyaki Grilled Corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients, except corn, into a pot.
2. Whisk together and bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 1 minute. Remove from heat.
4. Prepare grill. Husk corn and grill covered for 5 to 10 minutes.
5. When almost done, baste with glaze two or three times.
PER SERVING: 70 Cal.; 1g Prot.; 0.4g Fat; 15g Carb.; 6mg Sod.; 4g Fiber.
